description: Flight Risk Assessment (FRAT) — risk quantification that gates dispatch authorization

hard_stops.label: FRAT Black — Mission Cancelled
hard_stops.logic: FRAT score exceeds no-go threshold — mission cancelled

hard_stops.label: FRAT Red — No CP Override
hard_stops.logic: Red FRAT score without Chief Pilot override — mission held

soft_flags.label: FRAT Yellow — Mitigations Recommended
soft_flags.logic: Elevated risk — mitigations recommended before proceed

soft_flags.label: High Workload Combination
soft_flags.logic: High-workload combination — single pilot, night, IMC

soft_flags.label: Personal Minimums Exceeded
soft_flags.logic: Conditions exceed pilot's stated personal minimums

soft_flags.label: Weather Deteriorating Below Minimums
soft_flags.logic: Weather trending below minimums at destination
